title: coreopsis scabra
intro: Coreopsis scabra, also known as rough coreopsis or prickly coreopsis, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Coreopsis scabra include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic. Coreopsis scabra can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies such as salves and topical creams for skin issues and wound healing.
